techniques.name: PowerShell
techniques.detection: Monitor for obfuscated commands, encoded payloads, and bypass flags in PowerShell transcription logs

techniques.name: Password Guessing
techniques.detection: Monitor for multiple failed authentication attempts from a single source in a short time window

techniques.name: Remote Desktop Protocol
techniques.detection: Monitor for RDP connections from unusual source hosts or using service accounts

techniques.name: Exfiltration Over Unencrypted Non-C2 Protocol
techniques.detection: Monitor for large outbound data transfers to external IPs, especially outside business hours

techniques.name: Token Impersonation/Theft
techniques.detection: Monitor for API calls associated with token manipulation such as DuplicateToken and ImpersonateLoggedOnUser

techniques.name: Cloud Accounts
techniques.detection: Monitor for sign-ins from anomalous locations, impossible travel, and unfamiliar devices

techniques.name: Web Protocols
techniques.detection: Monitor for beaconing patterns in HTTP/HTTPS traffic and known C2 framework signatures

techniques.name: DNS
techniques.detection: Monitor for unusually high DNS query volumes, long subdomain names, and queries to newly registered domains

techniques.name: Exfiltration Over Symmetric Encrypted Non-C2 Protocol
techniques.detection: Monitor for DNS TXT record queries with high entropy content indicating encoded data

techniques.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
techniques.detection: Monitor for rapid file modification events, known ransomware extensions, and shadow copy deletion

techniques.name: Data from Cloud Storage
techniques.detection: Monitor for bulk download or access patterns to cloud storage significantly exceeding user baseline

techniques.name: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder
techniques.detection: Monitor for modifications to Run and RunOnce registry keys and Startup folder entries
data_sources: Windows Registry: Windows Registry Key Modification

techniques.name: LSASS Memory
techniques.detection: Monitor for processes accessing lsass.exe memory, especially using tools like Mimikatz or procdump

techniques.name: Dynamic-link Library Injection
techniques.detection: Monitor for processes loading DLLs from unusual paths or with WriteProcessMemory API calls

techniques.name: Obfuscated Files or Information
techniques.detection: Monitor for files with high entropy, encoded content, or packed executables

techniques.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
techniques.detection: Monitor WAF logs, web server error logs, and known CVE exploitation signatures

techniques.name: Disable or Modify Tools
techniques.detection: Monitor for security tool processes being stopped, uninstalled, or configuration changes
data_sources: Windows Registry: Windows Registry Key Modification

techniques.name: Local Account
techniques.detection: Monitor for new local account creation events, especially outside of standard provisioning workflows
